headline: Risk-on tape holds AH; desk adds ACHC + LKQ alongside QXO as semis surge cools into close

market_state.line: SPY flat/above 50d, QQQ +0.8%, VXX stress 0.97 — low fear, constructive for momentum entries AH.

actions.line: Half size; Signal+Risk green, Research low-conviction. Clean risk-on momentum, defined $0.65 risk.
Quarter size; Research against but tight $0.31 stop limits damage. Modest setup, take the small r/r.
Half size; Signal+Risk both constructive. RSI sweet spot, controlled climb, $1.75 target room.

watch.line: +21.8%, MACD bullish, 2x vol — storage/NAND move; watch for RTH continuation or fade setup.
+16%, MACD bullish, 2x vol — semi earnings-relief trade; check if move holds at open.
+20% on 13x vol, overbought flag — extended; watch for RTH gap-fade opportunity.
+16.3%, unusual vol, overbought — needs catalyst confirmation before chase.
+11.5% on 1.7x vol — no overbought flag; cleaner structure if move sustains into open.

changed: Desk expanded to three names: ACHC (half) and LKQ (quarter) added alongside existing QXO.
Semi/storage surge (SNDK, MU, TECH) now in watch-only — no desk takes on the big movers.
caveats: AH_POST window — prices as of 19:22 ET 2026-06-25; AH liquidity is thin, spreads wider, levels may gap significantly at RTH open.
Two of three desk takes have Research skeptical/against — size discipline (half/quarter) is load-bearing here.
